arts.ttl: Illan Meslier Leeds United transfer latest - England stars, Chelsea target and 'talks underway' - Leeds Live
arts.sum: The England international is unlikely to settle for a spot on the bench at St James' with a move to Leeds a potential avenue to explore, according to The Sun - especially if they gain promotion to the Premier League. Leeds have been linked with a number of goalkeepers in recent weeks, with Meslier's most recent errors costing the Whites' top spot in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Jeff Stelling on Leeds’ Burnley advantage
arts.sum: Leeds United have six games left to climb back into the automatic promotion places under Daniel Farke, starting with tonight’s trip to Middlesbrough. Stelling was in agreement with McCormack, reaffirming the idea that even with defeat to Middlesbrough tonight, it wouldn’t be game over for Leeds.

arts.ttl: Boro v Leeds United preview: Solomon must be axed
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has to find a solution to his stagnant attack tonight vs Middlesbrough, which could mean a spell on the bench for Manor Solomon . Farke’s press conference message to Largie Ramazani would indicate that the Belgian won’t be getting the nod over Solomon this week, but it does appear like time for some change on the left wing for Leeds.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's verdict on Leeds United's poor form and Middlesbrough's approach
arts.sum: But comparing Leeds’ recent run to Boro’s when they lost five in a row before turning things around, Carrick said ahead of Tuesday evening’s game: “It’s similar to ourselves. It doesn’t necessarily mean there is an awful lot wrong, it’s just fine margins at times in this league.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke's amazing Middlesbrough record highlighted as Patrick Bamford selection hint dropped
arts.sum: Farke called out Largie Ramazani after the draw at Luton, stating he had not been impressed with his ‘maturity’ when battling in duels in recent weeks. Another good substitute showing and another no-score from Piroe could raise calls for Bamford to be handed his first league start of the season in April.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: McCormack previews Boro (A)
arts.sum: “It’s not just the starting 11, Sheffield United are bringing players like Kieffer Moore, Tom Cannon, Callum O’Hare on in the striking areas, Leeds haven’t really got anyone, we start with (Joel) Piroe up top and if it’s not happening, they’ve got a young boy (Mateo) Joseph who’s unproved and is not a natural goalscorer. Leeds United’s trip to Middlesbrough tonight is arguably the biggest game of the season so far, with a win needed to put aside the poor run of current form.

arts.ttl: ‘I don’t think…’ – Leeds United score prediction for Middlesbrough trip shared by former EFL player

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough vs Leeds Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Middlesbrough, currently fifth in the Championship, host third-placed Leeds at the Riverside Stadium on Tuesday, April 8th, at 20:00. Both teams are vying for a coveted spot in the promotion playoffs....

arts.ttl: Ross McCormack shares Leeds United striker worry on talkSPORT
arts.sum: “It’s not just the starting 11, Sheffield United are bringing players like Kieffer Moore, Tom Cannon, Callum O’Hare on in the striking areas, Leeds haven’t really got anyone, we start with (Joel) Piroe up top and if it’s not happening, they’ve got a young boy (Mateo) Joseph who’s unproved and is not a natural goalscorer. Leeds United’s trip to Middlesbrough tonight is arguably the biggest game of the season so far, with a win needed to put aside the poor run of current form.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United XI vs Middlesbrough with Ampadu and Gnonto calls made
arts.sum: With Pascal Struijk out for at least the next two games, Leeds United boss Daniel Farke may opt to field Ethan Ampadu at centre-back against Middlesbrough tonight. Prior to Ampadu’s knee injury, United had kept six clean sheets in seven games with the pair at centre-half.
